Administrative • Email Management

Inbox Architecture & High-Volume Email Triage

Engineered a multi-tier automated filtration system using Boolean logic to triage a legacy inbox of 18,355+ unmanaged emails. Built custom filters for Urgent, Follow-Up, and Finance categories with automated labelling and instant visual cues.

About Me
The Intersection of
Technical Precision &
Administrative Excellence

I am Okoi Micheal Obeten, a Technical Virtual Assistant and Operations Consultant based in Abuja, Nigeria. With a B.Sc. in Computer Science and an M.Sc. in Information Technology in progress, I bring a rare blend of academic rigor and hands-on operational efficiency to every engagement.

My approach is simple: I do not just manage tasks — I build systems that make tasks manage themselves. From engineering automated email triage frameworks that process 18,000+ messages, to designing self-service support hubs that slash ticket volume by 60%, I transform operational chaos into streamlined, repeatable processes.

Whether partnering with a startup founder drowning in admin, or an executive who needs every minute optimized, I deliver solutions rooted in data, automation, and proactive problem-solving. My clients get their time back — and the confidence that nothing is slipping through the cracks.
